reason: Verified that the browser-use feature allows an agent to open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve page information, and return the results in chat.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the SuperAgent home page with the agents sidebar displayed.
Step 2: Found and clicked on "QA-20260502-183817-03ns" agent in the sidebar - The agent chat interface opened, showing the message input area and agent settings.
Step 3: Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field - Message was successfully entered and ready to send.
Step 4: Clicked the "Send message" button - Message was sent successfully. Agent status changed to "working" and began processing the request.
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent completed the task in 7 seconds. Response received in chat stating "The page title is Example Domain."
Step 6: Verified response and took screenshot - The screenshot confirms:
